document.title: Post-market Surveillance Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Post-market surveillance report for ADD(HAD1417MCW) Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector covering PMS data from initial CE marking on February 23, 2021 to April 08, 2024.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports MDR post-market surveillance and PSUR documentation by summarising PMS data, recalls, incidents, complaints, benefit-risk assessment, CAPA status, and PSUR update period.
keyPoints: The product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model ADD(HAD1417MCW).
The report references Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and states manufacturers of class IIa, IIb, and III devices shall prepare a PSUR under MDR Article 86.
Recall searches for FDA, MFDS, and MHRA reported no recalls for the stated search period.
No non-serious incidents, undesirable side-effects, feedbacks, or complaints were identified.
The risk was assessed as remaining acceptable, with no information verified that could affect benefit-risk.
The device risk class is Class IIa and the PSUR update period is once in two years.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the document's main regulatory framework is MDR Regulation (EU) 2017/745; FDA appears only as one recall search source.
Manufacturer name is not present in the source text body; it appears only in the source path.
The report uses both PMS Report and PSUR terminology, including a conclusion heading for PSUR Report.
